channel.title: Tech on j4xx3n
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on j4xx3n

item.title: Example Tech Article
item.description:
This is an example tech article. Replace this file with your own notes.

How this works

Your Obsidian vault folder structure maps directly to blog categories:

  • vault/tech/ → category: Tech
  • vault/personal/ → category: Personal
  • Each .md file becomes an article

Tips

  • You don’t need front matter — the script fills it in automatically
  • The article title defaults to the filename with dashes replaced by spaces
  • The date defaults to when you first committed the file to git
  • Add tags in front matter if you want them: tags: ["tag1", "tag2"]

item.title: Hello World
item.description:
This is my first blog post. I write here about things I find interesting.

Why I started this blog

I wanted a place to document my thoughts and projects without the noise of social media.

What to expect

  • Technical write-ups on things I build
  • Notes from books and courses I work through
  • Occasional personal reflections

Stay tuned.
